headline: JPMorgan deploys Coach AI across 9,600 wealth and private bank advisors — 95% faster client intelligence, 20% gross sales growth
the_so_what: When the world's most profitable bank publicly attributes 20% gross sales growth to an AI tool deployed across 9,600 advisors, it is no longer a pilot — it is the new performance benchmark every competing wealth manager will be measured against.
company_name: JPMorgan Private Bank and Wealth Management
source_name: JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management
summary: At JPMorgan Chase's 2025 Investor Day on May 20, the Asset & Wealth Management division disclosed the full scale of its Coach AI deployment across wealth management and private banking. Coach AI — built on NLP to surface real-time client intelligence, next-best-action recommendations, and research digests — is now broadly deployed across approximately 9,600 advisors spanning J.P. Morgan Wealth Management and J.P. Morgan Private Bank (Connect Coach). Advisors retrieve client information 95% faster using the tool. The Asset & Wealth Management division reported 20% year-over-year gross sales growth, with J.P. Morgan explicitly citing AI tools as a key contributor. The firm set a three-to-five year target of enabling each advisor to serve 50% more clients. J.P. Morgan reported $6.8 trillion in client assets in Q3 2025.

key_stat.label: Gross sales growth YoY — JPMorgan Asset & Wealth Management, AI tools cited as key driver (2025 Investor Day)

verified_claims: Coach AI broadly deployed across approximately 9,600 WM and PB advisors (J.P. Morgan 2025 Investor Day)
95% faster client information retrieval attributed to Coach AI (J.P. Morgan investor materials)
20% year-over-year gross sales growth in Asset & Wealth Management — AI tools cited as key driver (2025 Investor Day)
50% more clients per advisor capacity target over 3–5 years (2025 Investor Day)
Connect Coach: Private Bank equivalent of Coach AI, confirmed live (2024 launch)
$6.8 trillion in client assets reported Q3 2025 (JPMorgan earnings)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced from JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day Asset & Wealth Management presentation (May 20, 2025) and Q3 2025 earnings. human_approved: Track 2 entry written directly from verified investor day source.
